content.rendered: Zachary Bobroff is the Chief Product Officer (CPO), leading the vision, strategy, and execution of the AMI’s product portfolio. Zachary oversees product development, roadmap, and go-to-market strategies to drive growth and competitive differentiation, addressing evolving market needs and accelerating business success. With a degree from Georgia Tech, he has over 15 years of experience in the industry, building strong relationships with customers, vendors and partners.
